description_long: This is a round, wide-mouthed bowl with a thick, slightly raised rim and a gently bulging body that tapers toward a flat base. The surface has a rough, matte texture, suggesting it is made from unglazed clay or earthenware. Its color is a uniform light tan, reminiscent of natural, sun-baked pottery. The bowl appears hand-crafted, with subtle irregularities and a rustic finish, lacking any visible decorative patterns or ornamentation. The interior is spacious and open, suitable for holding a variety of contents. There are no visible cracks, chips, or signs of damage, indicating it is in good condition.
description: A rustic, light tan clay bowl with a wide mouth, thick rim, and rough matte surface, showing a hand-crafted appearance.
description_view_0: The bowl is seen from a slightly elevated angle, highlighting the thick rim and the deep, open interior.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the bowl's rounded body and the subtle tapering toward the base, with the rim clearly visible.
description_view_2: The bowl's bulging sides and the even, circular opening are prominent, showing the uniformity of its shape.
description_view_3: The bowl appears widest in this view, with the smooth curve of the body and the flat base subtly visible.
attribute_location: kitchen or outdoor communal cooking area
attribute_context_of_use: serving or holding food, water, or ingredients
